mapper.sql: user_id AS userId, email AS email, password_hash AS passwordHash, nickname AS nickname, role AS role, status AS status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM APP_USER WHERE email = #{email} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT
FROM APP_USER WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APP_USER ( email, password_hash, nickname, role, status ) VALUES ( #{user.email}, #{user.passwordHash}, #{user.nickname}, COALESCE(#{user.role}, 'USER'), COALESCE(#{user.status}, 'ACTIVE') )
mapper.update: UPDATE APP_USER SET nickname = #{nickname}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE APP_USER SET status = 'DELETED', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
